summary:
Plan to optimize the Audio-to-SRT pipeline with:
1. Per-file sequential pipeline (Matchâ†’Transcribeâ†’Verify for each file) instead of batch steps
2. Checkpoint system using file existence as implicit checkpoints
3. Skip-on-error strategy (continue to next file on failure)
4. Smart resume (skip completed steps based on existing output files)
5. Status tracking per file in the tree UI
